state.coderResponse:
All validation gates pass and every success criterion is met. Final summary:

**Validation gates (all green):**
- **Level 1** — `go vet ./internal/git/` → CLEAN (this is the gate that compiles the `_test.go`)
- **Level 2** — `go build ./internal/git/` → exit 0 (package integrity)
- **Level 3** — `gofmt -l internal/git/` → EMPTY (gofmt-clean)
- **Level 4** — `go test ./internal/git/ -v` → PASS (`TestHarness_BootstrapsRepoWithCommits` 0.02s + all 5 shipped S1 tests)
- **Level 5** — `go test ./...` → whole-module green (git/provider/ui unaffected)

**Deliverable:** `internal/git/gittestutil_test.go` — white-box `package git` (plain package line, no build tag), stdlib-only imports (`fmt`, `os`, `path/filepath`, `strconv`, `strings`, `testing`), with the four helpers (`mustRun`, `newTempRepo`, `writeFileStage`, `seedCommits` — each `tb testing.TB`-first + `tb.Helper()`) and the self-test `TestHarness_BootstrapsRepoWithCommits` proving ≥2 commits, a 40-char HEAD SHA, and exact deterministic identity readback against the real git 2.54.0 binary.

**Scope boundaries verified:** `git diff --stat` is empty (no tracked files modified — git.go, git_test.go, main.go, Makefile, go.mod, go.sum, internal/ui, internal/provider all untouched); the only source change is the new untracked file; `// Package git` appears exactly once (in git.go); Mode A godoc on all three helpers cites PRD §20.1 layer 2 + decisions.md §8; no external dep added; no `go mod tidy`.

```json
{
   "result": "success",
   "message": "Created internal/git/gittestutil_test.go: a white-box package git test harness driving the REAL git binary (PRD §20.1 layer 2) over a per-test tb.TempDir() repo. Implements mustRun (fail-fast run wrapper), newTempRepo (init -q + repo-local deterministic user.email/user.name/commit.gpgsign=false, returns UNBORN repo), writeFileStage (MkdirAll parent + write + git add of RELATIVE path), seedCommits (one commit per full message via a SINGLE -m arg preserving multi-line bodies, unique file<i>.txt per commit), and self-test TestHarness_BootstrapsRepoWithCommits. All 5 validation gates pass: go vet ./internal/git/ CLEAN, go build ./internal/git/ exit 0, gofmt -l empty, go test ./internal/git/ PASS (new self-test + 5 shipped S1 tests), go test ./... whole-module green. Scope respected: only the new file created (git diff --stat empty), stdlib-only imports, // Package git appears exactly once (in git.go), Mode A godoc on all three helpers citing PRD §20.1 layer 2 + decisions.md §8, no external dep, no go mod tidy."
}
```
